company_context: DaoAI is an AI visual inspection company. Core product: P-Series 2D PCBA AI AOI (Automated Optical Inspection). Key tech: SMT Visual AI, Auto BOM Matching, Semantic False Call Filter, Real-Time SPC Dashboard. Models: P1 (high-mix), P2 (high-volume SMT), P3/P3D. Value prop: Reduces AOI programming from 3 hours to 5 minutes, no Golden Board needed. Competitors: Koh Young, Mirtec, Omron — DaoAI differentiates with AI-driven, zero-programming approach.
content_pillars: AI AOI technology insights and trends
